Oceanview Hillside Estate in Cosón

$1,250,000 · Luxury villa for sale in Las Terrenas

TypeLuxury villa
ListingFor sale
Price$1,250,000
CityLas Terrenas
Bedrooms5
Bathrooms6
Area650 m²
Lot3200 m²

Spectacular luxury estate perched on the hills of Cosón, Las Terrenas. Offers breathtaking 180-degree ocean views, a massive infinity-edge pool, multiple covered terraces, professional chef kitchen, and guest bungalow. Fully private and surrounded by lush tropical nature.

Features: Ocean View, Pool, Infinity Pool, Guest House, Private Estate
